objective: Fix the single blocking gap (missing version pin on grove-core in cli/Cargo.toml) so both workspace crates pass cargo publish --dry-run, extend bump-version.sh to keep that pin in sync, and document the crates.io publish order in RELEASING.md.
key_changes: cli/Cargo.toml: change grove-core dependency from path-only to { path = "../core", version = "=0.1.11" } — the only change blocking cargo publish --dry-run -p grove
scripts/bump-version.sh: add a new step (between current steps 2 and 3) to update the version pin in the grove-core dependency line of cli/Cargo.toml atomically with every bump
RELEASING.md: add numbered cargo publish steps (grove-core first, then grove) and an ordering constraint explaining why core must publish before cli
Verify: cargo publish --dry-run -p grove-core already passes; cargo publish --dry-run -p grove must pass after the cli/Cargo.toml fix
Verify: cargo test --release --locked --workspace and cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings remain green
Crate name availability confirmed in plan: grove and grove-core are both unclaimed on crates.io — no fallback name required
